class.name: Terrain3DStreamer
class.description: This class manages runtime region streaming. Regions around the clipmap target are loaded on background threads and evicted as the target moves away, so memory scales with the loaded area instead of the whole terrain. It works with the slot pool in [Terrain3DData]; see [method Terrain3DData.enable_streaming]. Settings are exposed as aliases on the [Terrain3D] node (e.g. [member Terrain3D.streaming_enabled]), which is also where they are saved. Streaming only runs outside the editor; the editor always keeps the full terrain loaded.

method.name: abort_pending
method.description: Consumes and drops every in flight threaded load. An unconsumed threaded load stays pinned in the ResourceLoader forever, so this runs whenever streaming stops: rescans, disabling streaming at runtime, and leaving the tree.

method.name: get_stats
method.description: Returns live streaming counters: [code skip-lint]streaming_active[/code], [code skip-lint]resident[/code], [code skip-lint]free_slots[/code], [code skip-lint]inflight[/code], [code skip-lint]failed[/code], [code skip-lint]known[/code], [code skip-lint]landed_total[/code], [code skip-lint]evicted_total[/code], and [code skip-lint]land_ms_avg[/code] (an exponential moving average of an insertion's main thread cost in ms). Useful for debug overlays and tests.

method.name: is_active
method.description: Returns [code skip-lint]true[/code] when streaming is enabled and the game is running outside the editor.

method.name: scan_directory
method.description: Scans the data directory for region locations and resets streaming state. Only file names are read, nothing is loaded. Called automatically at initialization while streaming is active.

method.name: step
method.description: Runs the streaming state machine once: evicts regions that fell outside the loaded area, inserts completed loads, and requests missing regions. Called automatically once per physics frame while streaming is active.

members.member: How many regions may be loading on background threads at once. Loading runs wide while insertions stay narrow; see [member loads_per_frame].
How far out from the clipmap target regions are kept loaded, in regions. Regions one region beyond this distance are evicted (hysteresis, so regions don't churn at the boundary).

Enables region streaming at runtime. Instead of loading every region up front, regions within [member distance] of the clipmap target are loaded on background threads and evicted as the target moves away. Regions modified at runtime are saved back to the data directory before eviction. Has no effect inside the editor; see [method is_active].

How many completed region loads may be inserted into the terrain per physics frame. Each insertion uploads texture layers and updates collision on the main thread, so raising this trades hitching for faster fill in.
The shape of the loaded area around the clipmap target: a square block or a circle of radius [member distance]. A circle loads ~21% fewer regions at the same distance.
Capacity of the pooled texture arrays, in regions. Must exceed the loaded area (e.g. (2 * [member distance] + 1)² for a square shape) with headroom for regions in flight.

constants.constant: The loaded area is a square block of regions around the clipmap target.
The loaded area is a circle of regions around the clipmap target.
